summary: Iteration 2 visual refinement testing completed successfully. All 18 features tested and verified working correctly after visual styling updates. 100% success rate maintained from iteration 1. New visual elements (warmer gold colors, green mile shields, premium CTA button, medallion-style nav) render correctly and preserve all functionality.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Should use 'boxShadow' instead. Same as iteration 1.
react_native_issues.impact: No functional impact - just console warnings. Future React Native versions may require boxShadow syntax.

action_items: Optional: Update shadow* style props to boxShadow syntax to eliminate deprecation warnings (low priority, no functional impact - same as iteration 1)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Visual refinement successful - all functionality preserved
✅ New color palette implemented correctly (warmer gold #E0C27C)
✅ Green mile shields render correctly with dark green gradient (#1F4037, #27503B)
✅ Premium CTA button has green gradient background with gold border as specified
✅ Medallion-style bottom navigation icons with gold borders when active
✅ Gold accent lines (decorative double lines) visible in header and throughout
✅ All React Native components still used correctly
✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ testID attributes present on all interactive elements
✅ Mobile viewport (390x844) renders correctly with new styling
✅ No structural or behavioral changes - only visual styling updates

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend for this UI-only app
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 18 features tested and working after visual refinement

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - hardcoded placeholder data in driverData object in index.tsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 visual refinement completed successfully. Only styling changes were made - no structural or behavioral modifications. New visual elements: warmer gold colors (#E0C27C), green mile shields with dark green gradient, premium CTA button with green gradient and gold border, medallion-style bottom nav icons with gold treatment when active, gold accent lines throughout. All functionality from iteration 1 preserved at 100% success rate. Same deprecation warnings for shadow* props remain (low priority).
features_tested: ✅ Dashboard screen loads with all sections visible (header, route hero, welcome, CTA, cards, bottom nav)
✅ Header shows 'IRON MILES' title in gold color (#E0C27C) with decorative double gold lines
✅ Route hero section displays 'Chicago' and 'Denver' with GREEN mile shields showing '27' and '50'
✅ Mile shields use dark green gradient (#1F4037, #27503B) with gold borders
✅ Welcome section shows 'Welcome, Driver!' in gold text with small green shield
✅ Generate Workout CTA button visible with green gradient background and gold border
✅ Tapping Generate Workout button navigates to /generate-workout screen
✅ Back button on Generate Workout screen returns to Dashboard
✅ Current Miles card shows '+27' miles earned with gold progress bar
✅ Last Workout card shows 'Upper Body' and '+10 Miles'
✅ Quick Stats card shows 65 Workouts, 8,450 Steps, 720 Calories
✅ 4-tab bottom navigation with medallion-style circular icons
✅ Dashboard tab is highlighted/active by default with gold treatment
✅ Tapping Progress Map tab navigates to Progress Map placeholder screen
✅ Tapping Workouts tab navigates to Workouts placeholder screen
✅ Tapping Fuel tab navigates to Fuel placeholder screen
✅ Each placeholder screen shows COMING SOON text with gold styling
✅ Tapping Dashboard tab returns to Dashboard from any placeholder
✅ Scrolling works properly to reveal all dashboard content
